title: Evangelion Jo Ha Q Trilogy Trailer Vengeance
display_title: Evangelion Jo Ha Q Trilogy Trailer Vengeance
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Evangelion: Jo-Ha-Q (Trilogy Trailer) - Vengeance             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Thu Feb 14, 2013 6:30 pm This trailer is a must see. A lot of credit goes to the guy who put this together. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oBeeR-j6IiI&list=LLPShYpAPNKMbBUHHf4YcX0w

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Thu Feb 14, 2013 6:59 pm Wow, this is actually kind of cool. Makes out NTE to look dark and scathing as fuck (Even considering we're well into that now by Q). The start was really cool, with the bits of dialogue from Shinji about his father - And the most effective thing about the music is that repeating off kilter key/beat. Yeah, good job. My connection sucks though so had to watch it lower quality. Might try again later in HD.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Feb 14, 2013 7:12 pm It's doing a great job in capturing the essence of what NME is about, although it might be a bit too spoilerey for people who haven't seen it yet. Well made, nevertheless.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Feb 14, 2013 7:32 pm Not gonna lie, it gave me chills. Nicely done.

[]:             Quote Post by Amitch1991 » Fri Feb 15, 2013 3:48 am That is awesome, just wondering how they got the shots from 3.0, coz that looked like DVD quality to me :S

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Feb 15, 2013 7:47 am Amitch1991 wrote: That is awesome, just wondering how they got the shots from 3.0, coz that looked like DVD quality to me :S

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Feb 15, 2013 8:09 am I haven't checked them all, but certainly I recognise some of them from official trailers. The whole thing is rather overwhelming, though (in a good way).

[]:             Quote Post by JiJi » Fri Apr 26, 2013 1:00 am Definitely not from trailers. A few of the shots had to have been from some kind of 3.0 rip, such as the shot of Kaworu standing and getting farther away through a vortex right before Mari ejects Shinji from Eva-13 and the shot of Gendo with his new glasses.

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Fri Apr 26, 2013 4:57 am The two shots you mention are indeed from a trailer. See here: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13452/SPOILERS-Eva-30-Trailers-post-11-17/60/? My upload still seems to work: http://www.mediafire.com/download.php?jd0diivupozqio7

[]: Re: Evangelion: Jo-Ha-Q (Trilogy Trailer) - Vengeance             Quote Post by Empyrealist » Tue Oct 18, 2016 1:44 am YouTube has since taken this video down. Does anyone have a mirror or an offline copy?

[]: Re: Evangelion: Jo-Ha-Q (Trilogy Trailer) - Vengeance             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Oct 18, 2016 2:00 am Crap. I HAD to put off watching it.

[]: Re: Evangelion: Jo-Ha-Q (Trilogy Trailer) - Vengeance             Quote Post by StrokeMeGoat » Tue Oct 25, 2016 11:29 pm Well, that sucks. Whoever made it should've posted the fair-use bit, because I'm guessing it is actually protected from copyright infringement by that clause in the law. I'm guessing whoever owned the account doesn't have it within their power to fight the claim, although I imagine they have to have made more videos that have had copyright claims against them too, youtube doesn't typically terminate an account because of one video with a copyright claim.
